global_design_rules.alignment: Strictly Left-aligned for data and forms. Optical alignment over mathematical. Asymmetry used for visual tension on marketing sections.
global_design_rules.accessibility: High-contrast text (APCA standard). Mandatory focus states. Support prefers-reduced-motion.
global_design_rules.anti_patterns_avoided: No centering everything, no purple/teal gradients, no Inter for headings, no default Vercel-look.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-extrabold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-bold

typography.rules: Never use generic sans for headings. Apply tight tracking to headings (>32px) and loose tracking (0.2em) for overlines.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12) for public info, dense utility grids (p-4) for dashboards.
layout_spacing.marketing_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Used for Home, About, History.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Used for Crime Dashboard.
layout_spacing.container_padding: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/40. Fixed top, z-50.
surface_styles.cards_marketing: Flat background (bg-surface), 1px subtle border (border-border_subtle), no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg.
surface_styles.cards_dashboard: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout, 1px right/bottom borders, dense data presentation.
surface_styles.footer: Massive Space: py-20 bg-surface_dark text-text_inverse. High contrast shift from body.
surface_styles.sos_button: Tactile Neumorphism with pulsing ring. bg-emergency_red text-white shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(220,38,38,0.39)].

component_rules.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI (Input, Select, Form, Checkbox). Flat, sharp borders (rounded-md max), high-contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-border_focus focus:ring-offset-2).
component_rules.buttons: Action buttons are left-aligned or inline with forms. Use text-white for primary, text-text_primary for secondary outlines.
component_rules.tables: Shadcn Table for Crime Dashboard and Found Items. Left-aligned text, mono-font for numbers.
component_rules.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, override h-9 to h-auto to prevent text clipping.

motion_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-primary hover:text-white.
motion_interactions.transitions: Specific properties only: transition-transform duration-200 ease-out, transition-colors.
motion_interactions.emergency: Continuous slow pulse for SOS/Emergency action buttons.

icons_assets.style: Stroke width 2px for standard, 2.5px for active/selected.
icons_assets.installation: npm install lucide-react (already installed in standard setup)

media.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a modern railway station platform at dawn.
media.placement_instructions: Use as full-bleed hero background on Home page. MUST apply a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-primary/80 to-primary/40) so text is 100% readable.

media.description: Historical Indian railway scene transforming into modern digital era.
media.placement_instructions: Place in the History page header/hero section with max opacity 0.5 overlay.

media.description: Abstract minimalist background representing digital law enforcement.
media.placement_instructions: Use as the background for the Login Portal or Crime Dashboard header.
Use in the 'About GRP' or 'Passenger Help Desk' section to add authentic context.

page_specific_instructions.Home: Use 'Tetris Grid' for Quick Access. Emergency 112 should be highly visible in header. Ensure hero section text has APCA compliant contrast against the dark overlay.
page_specific_instructions.eFIR_Complaint: Break the form into logical Shadcn cards (or cardless sections with borders). Clear multi-step indicators. Avoid clutter.
page_specific_instructions.Crime_Dashboard: Use 'Control Room Grid'. Dense, data-heavy, use Recharts for analytics. Strict 1px borders, no soft shadows.
page_specific_instructions.Women_Safety: Needs a prominent SOS component (Sticky on mobile). Soft red accents (not pastel, but authoritative red).
page_specific_instructions.Lost_Found: Use image-heavy grid for Found items, clean Shadcn forms for Reporting lost items.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, links) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='complaint-submit-button'
